name: Michael nix
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Yunjun,
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We truly regret to hear about the misunderstanding and frustration you and your wife experienced during your home search. It’s always our goal to provide clear and accurate information to our clients.
We are committed to ensuring that such a situation does not occur in the future. Additionally, we will follow up on your concerns about communication and the information provided by our agents.
Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we deeply regret any inconvenience caused. Please reach out to us directly at contact@remaxedgeny.com if you have any further questions.
text: My wife and I found a two-family house on Zillow, located at 68 Cortelyou Ave, Staten Island, NY 10312. We immediately made an appointment with a real estate agent to see the house. Because my wife was obsessed with the 10312 school district, we matched their price of 838,000. We then made an appointment with a home inspector to inspect the house, and everything went smoothly when we entered the contract! The biggest flaw came out. This house was a one-family house from the beginning to the end, including the contract issued by the selling lawyer, which stated that it was a one-family house. Even if it had two kitchen meters, it was illegal. My wife and I had asked Miss Albee Lei countless times whether the house was a two-family house. She always said that it was 100% legal two-family. She was really lying without blushing. Because of her lies, we not only missed other houses we liked, but also wasted time and money (home inspection fees + lawyer fees). But now this house has been re-listed for sale, and we have not waited for their apology, including (DAN DONG of re/max)
textTranslated: Saya dan istri menemukan rumah dua keluarga di Zillow, yang berlokasi di 68 Cortelyou Ave, Staten Island, NY 10312. Kami langsung membuat janji temu dengan agen real estat untuk melihat rumah tersebut. Karena istri saya terobsesi dengan distrik sekolah 10312, kami menyamai harga mereka sebesar 838.000. Kami kemudian membuat janji temu dengan inspektur rumah untuk memeriksa rumah tersebut, dan semuanya berjalan lancar saat kami menandatangani kontrak! Cacat terbesar terungkap. Rumah ini adalah rumah satu keluarga dari awal hingga akhir, termasuk kontrak yang dikeluarkan oleh pengacara penjual, yang menyatakan bahwa itu adalah rumah satu keluarga. Sekalipun memiliki dua meter dapur, itu ilegal. Saya dan istri telah bertanya kepada Nona Albee Lei berkali-kali apakah rumah itu adalah rumah dua keluarga. Dia selalu mengatakan bahwa itu 100% legal untuk dua keluarga. Dia benar-benar berbohong tanpa malu. Karena kebohongannya, kami tidak hanya kehilangan rumah lain yang kami sukai, tetapi juga membuang-buang waktu dan uang (biaya inspeksi rumah + biaya pengacara). Tapi sekarang rumah ini telah terdaftar kembali untuk dijual, dan kami tidak menunggu permintaan maaf mereka, termasuk (DAN DONG dari re/max)
title: REMAX EDGE

I’m extremely disappointed with how Amalfi Apartments in Milpitas handled a recent towing incident. I registered my vehicle (Volkswagen ID.4) correctly on the evening of June 28, but accidentally mistyped one digit in the license plate (an 8 instead of a 9). Everything else was correct the make, model, and other details matched.

Despite this honest mistake, my car was towed, and I had to pay $530 to get it back.

To make matters worse, when I contacted David from management, he acknowledged the vehicle was registered but repeatedly told me trying to resolve the issue was a "waste of time." Zero empathy, no attempt to understand or help just complete dismissal.

I provided proof of registration and the towing receipt, but they still refused to issue any refund or even take responsibility. This is not just poor customer service it’s predatory and disrespectful.

If you're a resident or considering moving here, be warned:

One small mistake = $500+ loss

Management will not help or care

Communication is rude and unprofessional

I expected better from a place charging premium rent. This experience has completely shattered my trust in the management at Amalfi Apartments.

Semua hal lainnya sudah benar, merek, model, dan detail lainnya sesuai.

text:
I moved in about 9 months ago and by far I am having a very pleasant stay. what I was looking for in an apartment -
1. Spacious room with storage : Lucky enough I got a good one with good storage but incase u dont they do offer storage units so win -win .
2. Maintance : I called for maintance twice and both times they were very deligent and problem sorted within 24hours .
3. gym and pool : Maintained well, the restrooms are always clean , the pool is maintained . They also have two barbeque grills
4. Location - There is a garden just across . Mall literally 5 min away . Crossfit gym crazy close by . Food trucks visit frequently . Events organised in the park sometimes .
5. Leasing Office : Every member of the leasing team is so sweet. David and Theresa are the two I rememebr as the were there initially when we moved in.

textTranslated:
Saya pindah sekitar 9 bulan yang lalu dan sejauh ini saya menikmati tinggal di sini. Berikut beberapa hal yang saya cari di sebuah apartemen:
1. Kamar luas dengan penyimpanan: Untungnya saya mendapatkan kamar yang bagus dengan penyimpanan yang memadai, tetapi jika Anda tidak mendapatkannya, mereka juga menyediakan unit penyimpanan, jadi sama-sama menguntungkan.
2. Perawatan: Saya menghubungi bagian perawatan dua kali dan kedua kalinya mereka sangat rajin dan masalah diselesaikan dalam waktu 24 jam.
3. Gym dan kolam renang: Terawat dengan baik, toilet selalu bersih, kolam renang terawat. Mereka juga memiliki dua panggangan barbekyu.
4. Lokasi - Ada taman tepat di seberang. Mal hanya berjarak 5 menit. Gym CrossFit sangat dekat. Truk makanan sering berkunjung. Acara terkadang diadakan di taman.
5. Kantor Sewa: Setiap anggota tim sewa sangat ramah. David dan Theresa adalah dua orang yang saya ingat karena mereka ada di sana sejak awal ketika kami pindah.

Chloe, thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear about your experience and understand how frustrating this situation must have been, especially during a military relocation.
Our team aims to follow the Servicemembers Civil Relief Act (SCRA) guidelines, including lease termination timelines tied to the rental billing cycle. We recognize that this process can feel rigid, and we’re sorry if this caused inconvenience or added stress during your move. We always strive to clearly communicate lease terms, including renewal and month-to-month rate changes during your renewal offer process. Regarding your billing concerns, we would appreciate the opportunity to review your account in detail to ensure everything was applied correctly and transparently. Please contact our management office directly so we can discuss your concerns on the month to month rate mentioned. 
We sincerely value our military residents and apologize that you felt unsupported. I look forward to discussing this with you. Sincerely, Melissa - Community Manager 361.980.9700
text:
Attention military and SNAs!! This place is NOT military friendly at all!
I signed up for a one year lease and they automatically rolled me over month to month at an increased rate (hundreds of dollars) without ensuring I was good with this (it was in the fine print on contract somewhere). Even worse, when I gave them my military orders they held to SCRA enactment 30 Days from first of the BILLING cycle (the first of the month) so I was not prorated at all AND had to pay for TWO months of rent that I was not even supposed to be in the state for, since I got my orders after the first of the month. When I asked for a prorate 30 Days from my detachment or at least to only pay for one month, they were dismissive, and insisted that they were holding to SCRA. Which on a technicality they were but friends who were moving out of other apartment complexes were given the generosity of a prorate and didn't count the 30 Days from the first of the billing cycle.
Now two months later, after my "final" rent payment, I am being charged yet another $1,000. A majority of this for "rent" that was already paid two months ago! Some BS about it being the extra month to month charge which I shouldn't have even been moved into in the first place.
Regarding the facilities themselves, the first 2 months I lived there I had to ask weekly for someone to come power wash the myriad of pigeon poop all over the back porch (it was so bad you couldn't even open the back door without wanting to throw up), they got rid of the study room facilities and printer, there are cockroaches inside the apartments, and parking inside of the gate is an absolute nightmare, the "gate" is consistently left unlocked and there are a fair amount of homeless people lingering outside the gates and sometimes even inside (my car has been broken into multiple times).
If you are military, I absolutely do not recommend this place.You will be charged out the wazoo for a place that is not worth half of what you are being charged.
textTranslated:
Perhatian bagi militer dan SNA!! Tempat ini SAMA SEKALI TIDAK ramah terhadap militer!
Saya menandatangani kontrak sewa satu tahun dan mereka secara otomatis memperpanjangnya setiap bulan dengan tarif yang lebih tinggi (ratusan dolar) tanpa memastikan saya setuju dengan hal ini (itu tertulis di bagian bawah kontrak). Lebih buruk lagi, ketika saya memberi tahu mereka tentang perintah militer saya, mereka berpegang pada pemberlakuan SCRA 30 hari dari awal siklus PENAGIHAN (tanggal satu bulan) sehingga saya tidak mendapatkan perhitungan prorata sama sekali DAN harus membayar sewa DUA bulan yang seharusnya saya tidak berada di negara bagian tersebut, karena saya menerima perintah saya setelah tanggal satu bulan. Ketika saya meminta perhitungan prorata 30 hari dari tanggal penugasan saya atau setidaknya hanya membayar satu bulan, mereka menolak, dan bersikeras bahwa mereka berpegang pada SCRA. Secara teknis memang benar, tetapi teman-teman saya yang pindah dari kompleks apartemen lain diberi perlakuan istimewa berupa perhitungan prorata dan tidak menghitung 30 hari dari awal siklus penagihan.

Sekarang, dua bulan kemudian, setelah pembayaran sewa "terakhir" saya, saya dikenakan biaya tambahan $1.000 lagi. Sebagian besar untuk "sewa" yang sudah dibayar dua bulan lalu! Beberapa alasan omong kosong tentang biaya tambahan bulanan yang seharusnya tidak saya terima sejak awal.
Mengenai fasilitasnya sendiri, selama 2 bulan pertama saya tinggal di sana, saya harus meminta seseorang setiap minggu untuk membersihkan kotoran burung merpati yang berserakan di teras belakang (sangat parah sehingga Anda bahkan tidak bisa membuka pintu belakang tanpa ingin muntah), mereka menghilangkan fasilitas ruang belajar dan printer, ada kecoa di dalam apartemen, dan parkir di dalam gerbang adalah mimpi buruk, "gerbang" selalu dibiarkan tidak terkunci dan ada cukup banyak tunawisma yang berkeliaran di luar gerbang dan terkadang bahkan di dalam (mobil saya telah dibobol beberapa kali).
Jika Anda anggota militer, saya sama sekali tidak merekomendasikan tempat ini. Anda akan dikenakan biaya yang sangat mahal untuk tempat yang nilainya tidak sebanding dengan setengah dari harga yang Anda bayarkan.

Immediately when we moved in our countertop in our kitchen wasn’t even on as if the apartment didn’t have a thorough walkthrough before leasing. We made a maintenance order and they came to secure it quickly. We received our unit in pretty dirty conditions. That was only the beginning of the problems. We then had to have routine pest control (you have to call and get on the list every week) because of roaches during the first 2 months. The freezer’s ice machine had odd looking paint chips or dust in it. The smell and taste didn’t seem right. They said they would order a new part, but they never did. Either they didn’t want to spend the money or think we’d just forget about it. The front burner on our stove keeps going out and has electrical issues. It either doesn’t get hot at all or is on the highest heat no matter what setting. Our dryer doesn’t properly dry sometimes either. We’ve made orders for both where they come out and look at the problem. However, it keeps happening again. The lawn/grounds usually have dog poop and there’s a few residents here that don’t put their dog on a leash which is unsafe for residents (adults and children). The treadmill in the gym has been broken the whole time we’ve lived here so there’s only one at this time. My husbands car got broken into the night of 02/06/24 and they smashed the windows trying to start the car. This is our second car that’s been messed with. The gates are consistently broken. Sometimes the gate works and sometimes it’s just left open. We’ve never had this experience before, but got lucky at South Bay. So if we knew our 2 bed for $1900 apartment would include this experience we would’ve never chosen this property.
textTranslated: Kami pikir ini tempat yang bagus untuk ditinggali setelah pindah dari Austin. Namun, begitu kami pindah, meja dapur kami bahkan belum terpasang, seolah-olah apartemen tersebut tidak diperiksa secara menyeluruh sebelum disewakan. Kami mengajukan permintaan perbaikan dan mereka segera datang untuk memperbaikinya. Unit yang kami terima dalam kondisi cukup kotor. Itu baru permulaan masalah. Kemudian kami harus melakukan pengendalian hama rutin (Anda harus menelepon dan masuk daftar setiap minggu) karena adanya kecoa selama 2 bulan pertama. Mesin pembuat es di freezer memiliki serpihan cat atau debu yang aneh. Bau dan rasanya tidak enak. Mereka mengatakan akan memesan suku cadang baru, tetapi mereka tidak pernah melakukannya. Entah mereka tidak mau mengeluarkan uang atau mengira kami akan melupakannya begitu saja. Kompor bagian depan kami terus mati dan mengalami masalah listrik. Kompor tersebut terkadang tidak panas sama sekali atau selalu berada pada suhu tertinggi, apa pun pengaturannya. Pengering pakaian kami juga terkadang tidak mengeringkan dengan benar. Kami telah mengajukan permintaan untuk keduanya agar mereka datang dan memeriksa masalahnya. Namun, masalah itu terus terjadi lagi. Halaman/pekarangan biasanya penuh dengan kotoran anjing dan ada beberapa penghuni di sini yang tidak mengikat anjing mereka dengan tali, yang tidak aman bagi penghuni (dewasa dan anak-anak). Treadmill di gym selalu rusak selama kami tinggal di sini, jadi saat ini hanya ada satu. Mobil suami saya dibobol pada malam tanggal 02/06/2024 dan mereka memecahkan jendela saat mencoba menghidupkan mobil. Ini adalah mobil kedua kami yang dirusak. Gerbangnya selalu rusak. Terkadang gerbangnya berfungsi dan terkadang dibiarkan terbuka. Kami belum pernah mengalami hal ini sebelumnya, tetapi beruntung di South Bay. Jadi, jika kami tahu apartemen 2 kamar tidur seharga $1900 kami akan mengalami hal ini, kami tidak akan pernah memilih properti ini.

responseFromOwnerText:
Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We’re glad to hear that you enjoyed a quiet and relaxing stay — creating a peaceful environment for our guests is something we take seriously.

We did notice your 3‑star rating, and we’d really appreciate any additional details you can share about what we could have done to make your experience better. Guest feedback is incredibly valuable to us, and it helps us continue improving.

Thank you again for staying with us. We hope to welcome you back for an even better visit.

— Hotel Management
title: Holiday Inn Express Long Island City E - New York by IHG

address: 52-09 31st Pl, Long Island City, NY 11101
name: Joseph Walters
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Joseph,

Thank you so much for your outstanding review and for being a loyal guest during your business travels. We truly appreciate you taking the time to recognize Wendy — she is an exceptional member of our team, and your kind words will mean a great deal to her. Knowing that she consistently helps make your stays comfortable and stress‑free is exactly the level of hospitality we strive to deliver.

We’re also glad to hear that you enjoy our clean rooms, friendly staff, and convenient location. Your feedback about parking is completely understood. While parking in New York City is always challenging, we recognize how quickly those costs can add up for long‑term guests. We appreciate you sharing this perspective, and we will certainly take it into consideration as we continue evaluating ways to enhance the guest experience.

If you plan on staying with us long‑term again, please feel free to reach out — we’re happy to assist you with parking options.

Thank you again for your thoughtful review. We look forward to welcoming you back on your next trip.

— Hotel Management
text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Outstanding Customer Service from Wendy!

I have been staying at the Holiday Inn Express Long Island City regularly for business travel, and I wanted to recognize Wendy at the front desk for her exceptional customer service.

From the moment I arrive, Wendy always greets me with a warm smile and makes the check-in process quick and seamless. She consistently goes above and beyond to make sure I feel welcomed and appreciated. Whether it's ensuring I receive a bottle of water, offering fresh cookies after a long day, or simply checking to see if I need anything during my stay, her professionalism and kindness never go unnoticed.

As someone who travels frequently for work, customer service can make all the difference, and Wendy is a shining example of what hospitality should look like. She has made every stay comfortable and stress-free, and her dedication to guests is one of the main reasons I continue to return to this location.

I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting the area for business or leisure. The staff is friendly, the rooms are clean, and the location is convenient.

The only downside is the parking fee. Parking is not included in the nightly rate and currently costs approximately $40 per night. For guests staying for extended periods, especially several months while traveling for work, those costs can add up quickly. It would be great if the hotel could consider discounted parking rates for long-term guests.

That said, Wendy's outstanding service more than makes up for this inconvenience. Thank you, Wendy, for always making me feel at home!

— Joseph Walters
textTranslated:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Pelayanan Pelanggan Luar Biasa dari Wendy!

Saya sering menginap di Holiday Inn Express Long Island City untuk perjalanan bisnis, dan saya ingin memberikan apresiasi kepada Wendy di resepsionis atas pelayanan pelanggannya yang luar biasa.

Sejak saat saya tiba, Wendy selalu menyambut saya dengan senyum hangat dan membuat proses check-in cepat dan lancar. Dia selalu berusaha lebih dari yang diharapkan untuk memastikan saya merasa disambut dan dihargai. Baik itu memastikan saya mendapatkan sebotol air, menawarkan kue segar setelah seharian beraktivitas, atau sekadar menanyakan apakah saya membutuhkan sesuatu selama menginap, profesionalisme dan kebaikannya tidak pernah luput dari perhatian.

Sebagai seseorang yang sering bepergian untuk bekerja, pelayanan pelanggan sangat penting, dan Wendy adalah contoh nyata dari keramahan yang seharusnya. Dia telah membuat setiap kunjungan saya nyaman dan bebas stres, dan dedikasinya kepada para tamu adalah salah satu alasan utama saya terus kembali ke lokasi ini.

Saya sangat merekomendasikan hotel ini kepada siapa pun yang mengunjungi daerah ini untuk urusan bisnis atau liburan. Stafnya ramah, kamarnya bersih, dan lokasinya nyaman.

Satu-satunya kekurangan adalah biaya parkir. Parkir tidak termasuk dalam tarif per malam dan saat ini biayanya sekitar $40 per malam. Bagi tamu yang menginap dalam jangka waktu lama, terutama beberapa bulan saat melakukan perjalanan kerja, biaya tersebut dapat bertambah dengan cepat. Akan sangat bagus jika hotel dapat mempertimbangkan tarif parkir diskon untuk tamu jangka panjang.

Meskipun demikian, pelayanan Wendy yang luar biasa lebih dari cukup untuk menutupi ketidaknyamanan ini. Terima kasih, Wendy, karena selalu membuatku merasa seperti di rumah!

— Joseph Walters

text: Booked this hotel because of proximity to family. It isn’t near public transportation;only an infrequent bus & taxi. The bed was comfortable. AC. good. Linens clean & adequate. Fast elevator. Breakfast buffet ok; typical free breakfast of a couple of hot items, breads, cereals, etc., no working toaster. Buffet staff kept items filled & tables cleaned. Tables need leveling; everyone we sat at rocked. The room was adequate. The rooms appeared clean, but if we walked barefoot, the bottoms of our feet would be dirty. Not near restaurants or shopping; seems to be an industrial area. It is only 15 minutes from LGA. Probably would find a hotel closer to public transportation.Near a noisy highway.
textTranslated: Saya memesan hotel ini karena dekat dengan keluarga. Letaknya tidak dekat dengan transportasi umum; hanya ada bus dan taksi yang jarang. Kasurnya nyaman. AC berfungsi baik. Seprai bersih dan memadai. Lift cepat. Sarapan prasmanan lumayan; sarapan gratis standar dengan beberapa pilihan makanan panas, roti, sereal, dll., pemanggang roti tidak berfungsi. Staf prasmanan selalu mengisi ulang makanan dan membersihkan meja. Meja perlu diratakan; semua meja yang kami duduki bergoyang. Kamar cukup memadai. Kamar tampak bersih, tetapi jika kami berjalan tanpa alas kaki, telapak kaki kami akan kotor. Tidak dekat dengan restoran atau tempat belanja; tampaknya merupakan kawasan industri. Hanya 15 menit dari LGA. Mungkin akan lebih baik mencari hotel yang lebih dekat dengan transportasi umum. Dekat dengan jalan raya yang berisik.

Hi Lee,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear about the concerns you experienced during your stay, and we appreciate the opportunity to clarify a few points.

Regarding breakfast, we do provide complimentary water each morning along with our full selection of beverages. 

Parking in NYC in any garage or private lot is not free. Local street parking is available at your own risk, and we always encourage guests to carefully follow posted signage.

We take pride in delivering genuine service, and we’re sorry that your experience did not reflect the level of hospitality we aim to provide. Your comments about communication and training will be reviewed with our leadership team to ensure we continue improving.

If you would like to discuss your stay further, I’d be happy to connect directly and assist in any way I can.

Warm regards,

Warm regards, Management Team Holiday Inn Express LIC

text:
IF YOU LIVE IN APT 832 THEY ARE CHARGING YOU 200 PLUS WHAT I PAID. where do I start I guess I’ll start on the trash. They say oh we will charge whoever keeps leaving the trash next to the trash compactor but they never caught anyone. They don’t have cameras on it at all. But they have trash inside the compactor. Next let’s talk about the stairs/common area. The are multiple bug nest that weren’t taken care of even though I’ve made work orders to take care of it. The gutters are full of pine as in the picture provided. I’ve put work orders for bug nest that were over me in the balcony area and never got taken care of. Let’s talk about the big issue, I made a work order for possible mold in my master bath. They tip toe over it for 8 months. They don’t like it when you make it a issue and want it done right.

Let’s not forget that they went through property managers for the past two years. They had at least eight private managers, since I moved in there. The maintenance team couldn’t hold on to the same crew for long. The maintenance crew got progressively worse at their jobs.

They can’t keep the dog areas for poop picked up.  They can’t keep the lights around the parking lot lit. The gates rarely work, and when they do they are up for maybe a few months then they go back down.

They have a lease agreement that’s very vague about the cleaning and doesn’t state that there is a mandatory carpet cleaning fee. I asked for documentation that states that I have required to pay for it at move out but they can’t provide me documents that said I signed a “move in/ move out charge list.

They hold you to a standard that they don’t hold themselves. Meagan would talk over you and claim you are being disrespectful to her staff over the phone but when I asked the man I was with he even said I wasn’t disrespectful to him .

Meagan wants to say I broke the law doesn’t even know the law herself when I recorded her in a space that had no expectation of privacy. She doesn’t know what a one party state is when it comes to recording

JIKA ANDA TINGGAL DI APT 832, MEREKA MENGENAKAN BIAYA 200 DOLAR LEBIH DARI YANG SAYA BAYAR. Dari mana saya harus mulai? Kurasa saya akan mulai dari masalah sampah. The apartment was a good size, nice big bathtub, hardwoods in most of the living spaces, nice walk in closet and decent size laundry room which washer and dryer rental was an option which was great. My biggest quarrel is the gate was broken the entire time I lived there. The fey fob was 300-500 dollars I believe and I never used it. The clubhouse was never locked with the key fob, when I asked about a refund for the key fob I was told no because it does open the fitness center. But sadly it was never locked so I’m unsure about that. The maintenance guys are great and were very timely about work orders. A lot of the apartments smelled of marijuana, the trash compactor was broken a lot recently so made the grounds look unkept in those instances. But no big complaints just wish there was some compensation for having to get a key fob for a gate and door that never was working or locked.
textTranslated: Saya tinggal di apartemen ini selama setahun. Proses pindah masuk dan pindah keluar mudah. ​​Apartemennya berukuran bagus, bak mandi besar yang nyaman, lantai kayu di sebagian besar ruang tamu, lemari pakaian yang luas, dan ruang cuci berukuran layak yang mana penyewaan mesin cuci dan pengering merupakan pilihan yang bagus. Keluhan terbesar saya adalah gerbangnya rusak selama saya tinggal di sana. Kunci elektronik (fob) harganya sekitar 300-500 dolar dan saya tidak pernah menggunakannya. address: 1185 Collier Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
name: Matthew Silliman
text:
I have lived here for 1.5 years. I will be moving out at the end of my lease.

update: And a few weeks ago we had a gunman firing rounds after getting into a fight at an unsupervised pool party. :(

Living at 1185, now The Eliza, has been frustrating for reasons that are largely preventable. I am a smart and patient person. If I have reached the point of posting this publicly, it is because repeated issues have not been meaningfully addressed.

Below are the primary concerns, along with reasonable expectations for improvement.

1. Guest Parking and Booting

Guest parking is unnecessarily restrictive. Parking inside the complex without a handwritten guest pass issued by the office results in immediate booting. The office operates 9 AM to 6 PM during the week only, which makes spontaneous visits virtually impossible. Guests parked on surrounding streets now require passes as well.

If a vehicle is booted, the office will not assist with removal. The tenant is left to resolve it directly with the booting company, at $75 per incident. For a property at this price point, there should be a more reasonable and tenant-friendly process, especially when mistakes occur.

2. Gate and Access Issues

Only one gate clicker is issued per leaseholder. I recently added my girlfriend to the lease so she could receive one. While that policy itself is understandable, the backup access system, the call boxes at the gate and doors, works intermittently.

There have been multiple instances where the system was down. At one point, my 16-year-old son was locked out for nearly two hours. A gated community must have reliable access systems.

3. Persistent Marijuana Smoke

Although the property is advertised as smoke-free, marijuana smoke is pervasive throughout the complex. Occasional reminder emails are sent, but there is no visible enforcement. Whatever one’s personal views may be on the topic, residents paying for a smoke-free environment should not have to live in constant odor.

4. Trash and Cleanliness

Common areas are frequently left with food, drink containers, and full garbage bags dropped on the floors in hallways. When this happens over weekends, it can sit until Monday morning. Maintenance appears to work hard, but enforcement and accountability among residents are lacking. This is more about the tenants than mgt but it is a frequent problem you should be aware of.

5. Noise and Parties

There are frequent late-night parties, often extending to 3 or 4 AM, particularly around the pool and on balconies. This is not occasional noise, it is routine disruption. One recent party resulted in a fire alarm being pulled at 3 AM.

For a community that includes families and professionals, this level of ongoing disturbance should be addressed through fines or lease enforcement.

6. Pest Control

Despite paying a pest control fee, I have dealt with roaches and a significant ladybug infestation. Pest control visits have been minimal and largely ineffective. A few traps are placed, but there is no comprehensive treatment. Preventative, scheduled spraying would be appropriate at this price level.

7. Maintenance Delays

My flooring was visibly lifting and buckling. It took NINE months of requests before it was repaired, and only after I indicated I would escalate the issue publicly. This should not be the standard required to resolve a clear maintenance problem.

To be fair, there are positives. The location is excellent. The staff members are kind and courteous, though they often seem constrained by higher-level management. My immediate neighbors are friendly. Pets are allowed. On nights without parties, it can be reasonably quiet.

However, based on the price of rent being charged, these recurring issues should not be normal. Policies feel punitive rather than service-oriented, especially around booting. When errors occur, tenants are still directed to the property manager, who in my experience has rarely followed up and has not provided meaningful resolution.

Prospective renters should weigh these realities carefully before signing a lease.
textTranslated:
Saya sudah tinggal di sini selama 1,5 tahun. Saya akan pindah setelah masa sewa saya berakhir.

Update: Dan beberapa minggu yang lalu ada seorang pria bersenjata yang melepaskan tembakan setelah terlibat perkelahian di pesta kolam renang tanpa pengawasan. :(

Tinggal di 1185, sekarang The Eliza, sangat membuat frustrasi karena alasan yang sebagian besar dapat dicegah. Saya adalah orang yang cerdas dan sabar. Jika saya sampai pada titik memposting ini secara publik, itu karena masalah yang berulang belum ditangani secara berarti.

Berikut adalah kekhawatiran utama, beserta harapan yang wajar untuk perbaikan.

1. Parkir Tamu dan Penindakan

Parkir tamu terlalu ketat. Parkir di dalam kompleks tanpa izin tamu tulisan tangan yang dikeluarkan oleh kantor akan langsung ditindak. Kantor hanya beroperasi pukul 9 pagi hingga 6 sore pada hari kerja, yang membuat kunjungan spontan hampir tidak mungkin. Tamu yang parkir di jalan-jalan sekitar sekarang juga memerlukan izin.

Jika kendaraan ditindak, kantor tidak akan membantu dalam proses penindakan. Penyewa dibiarkan menyelesaikannya langsung dengan perusahaan penindakan, dengan biaya $75 per insiden. Untuk properti dengan harga seperti ini, seharusnya ada proses yang lebih masuk akal dan ramah penyewa, terutama ketika terjadi kesalahan.

2. Masalah Gerbang dan Akses

Hanya satu remote gerbang yang diberikan per penyewa. Baru-baru ini saya menambahkan pacar saya. agar dia bisa mendapatkan akses ke properti tersebut. Meskipun kebijakan itu sendiri dapat dimengerti, sistem akses cadangan, yaitu kotak telepon di gerbang dan pintu, bekerja secara tidak stabil.

Ada beberapa kejadian di mana sistem tersebut mati. Pada suatu waktu, putra saya yang berusia 16 tahun terkunci di luar selama hampir dua jam. Kompleks perumahan berpagar harus memiliki sistem akses yang andal.

3. Asap Ganja yang Terus-menerus

Meskipun properti tersebut diiklankan sebagai bebas asap rokok, asap ganja tersebar luas di seluruh kompleks. Email pengingat sesekali dikirim, tetapi tidak ada penegakan yang terlihat. Apa pun pandangan pribadi seseorang tentang topik ini, penghuni yang membayar untuk lingkungan bebas asap rokok seharusnya tidak perlu hidup dalam bau yang terus-menerus.

4. Sampah dan Kebersihan

Area umum seringkali dibiarkan dengan makanan, wadah minuman, dan kantong sampah penuh yang berserakan di lantai di lorong-lorong. Jika ini terjadi di akhir pekan, sampah tersebut dapat tetap ada hingga Senin pagi. Pemeliharaan tampaknya bekerja keras, tetapi penegakan dan akuntabilitas di antara penghuni kurang. Ini lebih tentang penyewa daripada manajemen, tetapi ini adalah masalah yang sering terjadi yang harus Anda waspadai.

5. Kebisingan dan Pesta

Sering terjadi pesta larut malam, seringkali hingga pukul 3 atau 4 pagi, terutama di sekitar kolam renang dan di balkon. Ini bukan kebisingan sesekali, tetapi gangguan rutin. Salah satu pesta baru-baru ini mengakibatkan alarm kebakaran berbunyi pada pukul 3 pagi.

Untuk komunitas yang mencakup keluarga dan para profesional, tingkat gangguan yang terus-menerus ini harus ditangani melalui denda atau penegakan perjanjian sewa.

6. Pengendalian Hama

Meskipun membayar biaya pengendalian hama, saya telah berurusan dengan kecoa dan infestasi kepik yang signifikan. Kunjungan pengendalian hama sangat minim dan sebagian besar tidak efektif. Beberapa perangkap dipasang, tetapi tidak ada perawatan komprehensif. Penyemprotan pencegahan terjadwal akan tepat pada tingkat harga ini.

7. Penundaan Pemeliharaan

Lantai saya terlihat terangkat dan melengkung. Butuh SEMBILAN bulan permintaan sebelum diperbaiki, dan hanya setelah saya menyatakan akan meningkatkan masalah ini secara publik. Ini seharusnya bukan standar yang diperlukan untuk menyelesaikan masalah pemeliharaan yang jelas.

Untuk bersikap adil, ada hal positifnya. Lokasinya sangat bagus. Para stafnya ramah dan sopan, meskipun mereka sering tampak dibatasi oleh manajemen tingkat atas. Tetangga terdekat saya ramah. Hewan peliharaan diperbolehkan. Pada malam-malam tanpa pesta, suasananya cukup tenang.

Namun, berdasarkan harga sewa yang dikenakan, masalah-masalah yang berulang ini seharusnya tidak normal. Kebijakan terasa lebih bersifat menghukum daripada berorientasi pada pelayanan, terutama terkait pengusiran. Ketika terjadi kesalahan, penyewa masih diarahkan ke manajer properti, yang menurut pengalaman saya jarang menindaklanjuti dan tidak memberikan solusi yang berarti.

Calon penyewa harus mempertimbangkan kenyataan ini dengan cermat sebelum menandatangani perjanjian sewa.

name: SJ & Kymm
responseFromOwnerText: SJ and Kymm, we are touched to know how special our community is to you! From our immaculate homes to our all-star team, worthwhile amenities, and friendly atmosphere, everything we do is for you.
text:
We have been living at The Edge for nearly 2 years and have had many positive experiences here. When we first looked at apartments within the Milpitas area, we considered a few other complexes along with The Edge. The staff, amenities, and price per unit were big factors when we decided on choosing The Edge. We had our tour with the leasing office manager, Cici, and she was super nice and knowledgeable. The model units we toured were beautifully designed and we could really picture our lives here. We got super lucky with the unit we ended up with; courtyard view, near the stairwell, and having the darker color scheme. When we compared other apartment complexes that we toured with The Edge, they honestly couldn't compare, in our opinion.

Management and the leasing office staff are very welcoming, kind, and helpful whenever we have questions. They are also quick to send updates when maintenance or issues occur within the building.

The maintenance staff are also great; they are surprisingly quick to respond to our work orders considering how big the complex is. They work efficiently and are very considerate by wearing shoe booties upon entering our home.

The amenities are great; roof top pool with bbq grills, fitness center, courtyards, club room, game room, and computer room are all typically well maintained. We have enjoyed spending time in most of these areas with our favorite is definitely the rooftop pool!

The noise insulation is also truly amazing; we hardly ever hear our neighbors when inside our home which is a huge plus when you have dogs or children (with the exception of having the windows open or passing by neighbors' front doors which isn't a huge dealbreaker for us).

We love walking around the neighborhood since we are close to it all; Trader Joe's, Starbucks, the park, tennis court, BART, and Great Mall.

This complex is great for all types of families because The Edge truly has it all!
textTranslated:
Kami telah tinggal di The Edge selama hampir 2 tahun dan memiliki banyak pengalaman positif di sini. Ketika pertama kali mencari apartemen di area Milpitas, kami mempertimbangkan beberapa kompleks lain selain The Edge. Staf, fasilitas, dan harga per unit merupakan faktor besar ketika kami memutuskan untuk memilih The Edge. Kami melakukan tur dengan manajer kantor leasing, Cici, dan dia sangat ramah dan berpengetahuan. Unit contoh yang kami kunjungi didesain dengan indah dan kami benar-benar dapat membayangkan kehidupan kami di sini. Kami sangat beruntung dengan unit yang kami dapatkan; pemandangan halaman, dekat tangga, dan memiliki skema warna yang lebih gelap. Ketika kami membandingkan kompleks apartemen lain yang kami kunjungi dengan The Edge, menurut kami, kompleks lain tersebut tidak dapat dibandingkan.

Manajemen dan staf kantor leasing sangat ramah, baik, dan membantu setiap kali kami memiliki pertanyaan. Mereka juga cepat mengirimkan pembaruan ketika ada pemeliharaan atau masalah yang terjadi di dalam gedung.

Staf pemeliharaan juga hebat; mereka sangat cepat menanggapi permintaan perbaikan kami mengingat betapa besarnya kompleks ini. Mereka bekerja efisien dan sangat perhatian dengan mengenakan penutup sepatu saat memasuki rumah kami.

Fasilitasnya luar biasa; kolam renang di atap dengan panggangan BBQ, pusat kebugaran, halaman, ruang klub, ruang permainan, dan ruang komputer semuanya umumnya terawat dengan baik. Kami menikmati menghabiskan waktu di sebagian besar area ini, dan favorit kami tentu saja kolam renang di atap!

Isolasi suara juga benar-benar menakjubkan; kami hampir tidak pernah mendengar tetangga kami saat berada di dalam rumah, yang merupakan nilai tambah besar jika Anda memiliki anjing atau anak-anak (kecuali jika jendela terbuka atau melewati pintu depan tetangga, yang bukan masalah besar bagi kami).

Kami senang berjalan-jalan di sekitar lingkungan karena kami dekat dengan semuanya; Trader Joe's, Starbucks, taman, lapangan tenis, BART, dan Great Mall.

Kompleks ini sangat cocok untuk semua jenis keluarga karena The Edge benar-benar memiliki semuanya!

responseFromOwnerText: Sherry, we understand how important reliable hot water access is, and we are sorry to hear of any lingering concerns about the functioning of your home. Your feedback has been elevated for prompt review and action, and in the meantime, we would like to speak with you at theedge@legacypartners.com. Please contact us so that we can arrange for any necessary maintenance service in your home and restore your satisfaction. Thank you.
text:
I’ve had a very frustrating experience living here. There has been no reliable hot water for an extended period, even after multiple repair attempts. Maintenance initially did plumbing work, which then caused leaking, followed by additional repairs that required placing a dehumidifier in the bedroom running for over 70 hours—it was extremely loud and disruptive.

Despite all of this, the hot water issue is still not resolved. Sometimes it works, but most of the time there is either no hot water at all, or you have to run the water for more than 2 minutes before it gets warm.

There have been too many ongoing repairs, and the situation has significantly impacted normal daily life and basic comfort. This level of disruption, especially for something as essential as hot water, is unacceptable.

I flagged to their maintenance and leasing office. Their head of maintenance came in and told me waiting for 1-2mins until the warm(not even hot) water came out is normal. This is ridiculous!
textTranslated:
Saya mengalami pengalaman yang sangat mengecewakan tinggal di sini. Tidak ada air panas yang andal selama periode yang cukup lama, bahkan setelah beberapa kali upaya perbaikan. Awalnya, petugas pemeliharaan melakukan pekerjaan perbaikan pipa, yang kemudian menyebabkan kebocoran, diikuti oleh perbaikan tambahan yang mengharuskan pemasangan alat pengering udara di kamar tidur yang beroperasi selama lebih dari 70 jam—sangat berisik dan mengganggu.

If The Edge could receive zero stars, I would not even give it one. Honestly, this place deserves negative ten(-10). The quality of management and living conditions is unbelievably bad.

address: 1514 Ennis Joslin Rd, Corpus Christi, TX 78412
name: Justin Hall
responseFromOwnerText: This is important feedback and we're sorry for your frustration, Justin. Please reach out to our team at (361) 991-2149 so we can discuss your concerns in greater detail. What you've detailed here about broken items in your living space, disappointing service from our team, and issues with move-out fees is very concerning. We hope to hear from you soon!
text: Very poorly managed. In my stay, things constantly broke: air conditioner, both toilets, kitchen cabinets, dishwasher, toilet paper holder, and more. Staff parked in my assigned parking spot several times. Repairs for the toilets and A/C took multiple visits from maintenance where the issue still wasn’t fixed and I had to plead for replacement units. Rent is higher than average here, and it’s just not worth it. I was charged ridiculously high move-out fees that were eventually [slightly] lowered, but this process took 6 months due to management failing to respond to emails in a timely manner, resulting in a collection negatively affecting my credit score (when I haven’t missed a payment of any sort in my life). If it weren’t for the water view, this complex is below average at best.
textTranslated: Pengelolaannya sangat buruk. Selama saya tinggal di sana, banyak hal yang terus-menerus rusak: AC, kedua toilet, lemari dapur, mesin pencuci piring, tempat tisu toilet, dan banyak lagi. Staf beberapa kali memarkir kendaraan di tempat parkir yang telah ditentukan untuk saya. Perbaikan toilet dan AC membutuhkan beberapa kunjungan dari petugas pemeliharaan, namun masalahnya tetap tidak teratasi dan saya harus memohon agar diganti dengan unit baru. Sewa di sini lebih tinggi dari rata-rata, dan sama sekali tidak sepadan. Saya dikenakan biaya pindah yang sangat tinggi yang akhirnya [sedikit] diturunkan, tetapi proses ini memakan waktu 6 bulan karena manajemen gagal menanggapi email tepat waktu, yang mengakibatkan penagihan yang berdampak negatif pada skor kredit saya (padahal saya tidak pernah menunggak pembayaran apa pun sepanjang hidup saya). Jika bukan karena pemandangan lautnya, kompleks ini paling banter hanya di bawah rata-rata.

address: 1514 Ennis Joslin Rd, Corpus Christi, TX 78412
name: Chanel R
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Chanel - thanks for this detailed review. We’re very sorry to hear about the challenges you’ve experienced with management, maintenance, and community amenities, as well as the frustrations with neighbors and pet facilities. Please know that this is certainly not the experience we want for anyone here. We would like the opportunity to discuss your experience in greater detail. Please call our team directly at (361) 991-2149 so we can better understand your concerns and how we can assist.
text:
The landlord special apartments, DO NOT move here if you want to waste your money!

The only time the apartment reaches out to me is to PAY something.. This is a money hungry property, there's always somebody new in office and the only time you meet them is when they reach out about money.. a random stranger.. NOT comfortable.

Dog poop and pee allover so bad my tiny dog is covered in it and has to be bathed EVERY day from going outside. And telling me to spy on my neighbors and record them and send videos of them and their dog pooping is VERY uncomfortable and weird, who has time for that, use your cameras or YOU do it, you're getting paid to work here NOT me.

There's been emails sent out with "threats," about people leaving trash cans or trash outside, even though they do not pertain to me, I have read it and said "wow, they can catch people on camera about trash and fine them but not catch people literally breaking in or stealing boats or bikes or kayaks...ok"

A ton of rude & racist neighbors encounters, to the point we don't even go to the dog park anymore- even having people turn around and go the other way when seeing me walking...

After years here, there were so many things that were promised to me by the last manager that never got done but they will blow my phone up over $10.

Not a truly friendly property, I'm just a number- never paid late in YEARS and got told it was an issue that I was paying early lol. Everything is always a problem to the point where I have tried to do my own maintenance to not have to deal with staff. I loved the old crew that worked there they got things DONE without an attitude or making you feel like you're bothering them.

I ALSO didn't get a notice when there was a literal hole in the wall of the building , there also was no cleanup because there was still glass ALLOVER the sidewalk and my pup stepped on a piece.

Asking for a PAID pet screening when you already had to pay HUNDREDS for your pet to move in, again, another money grab. But I have holes in my walls that were covered by tape and painted, before I moved in. Even with pest control, the ants here are extremely bad and you have to still spend your OWN money for pet safe solutions.

The caulking is so bad in my apartment,  tiny holes and gaps in the laundry room and bathrooms; around the tubs and shower so you might see some creepy crawlies, even the bathroom that's never used I've seen spiders on the counter at the end of the week when I do the weekly flush and walk through of it.

The scratches that were engraved in my floor, makes it almost impossible to clean the floors because of whomever lived here. Even though I was told nobody has lived here for a long time before me, obviously a LIE.

I never even got HANDLES on my cabinets lol and it was not renovated as promised when shown the other apartment. The lights in here all have bugs since I first moved in.... You can't ask for anything , well I cant, or I'm treated like a problem so I have dealt with it but this place has pushed me to the limit and I am DONE.

Every single neighbor I have had has left after months, not even a full year. Which is disheartening because the few people that have been welcoming and friendly, leave, because of how this property treats people. $1700 a month for a "landlord special."

Neighbors have left their trash outside for days causing bugs with no repercussion but I left my trash can out side on accident for an extra few hours and got fined. I have not felt welcomed here in a long time and cannot talk to the manager because I call and do not get a call back after literal MONTHS!

The dog park, aside from the people that make it uncomfortable,  there's so much poop there its insane, they removed the pet bath (even though it was listed as something we would have at the dog park so that was one of the reasons I chose here) was removed without warning and never put back so after your dog is covered in poop and pee from the dog park you have to wash them in your home.
textTranslated:
Apartemen ini sangat mahal, JANGAN pindah ke sini jika Anda ingin membuang-buang uang!

Satu-satunya waktu pihak apartemen menghubungi saya adalah untuk MEMBAYAR sesuatu... Ini properti yang rakus uang, selalu ada orang baru di kantor dan satu-satunya waktu Anda bertemu mereka adalah ketika mereka menghubungi tentang uang... orang asing yang tidak dikenal... SANGAT tidak nyaman.

Kotoran dan air kencing anjing bertebaran di mana-mana, anjing kecil saya sampai tertutup kotoran dan harus dimandikan SETIAP hari karena buang air di luar. Dan menyuruh saya untuk memata-matai tetangga saya dan merekam mereka serta mengirimkan video mereka dan anjing mereka buang air besar SANGAT tidak nyaman dan aneh, siapa yang punya waktu untuk itu, gunakan kamera Anda atau ANDA yang melakukannya, Anda dibayar untuk bekerja di sini BUKAN saya.


Ada email yang dikirim berisi "ancaman" tentang orang-orang yang meninggalkan tempat sampah atau sampah di luar, meskipun itu tidak berkaitan dengan saya. Saya membacanya dan berkata, "Wow, mereka bisa menangkap orang di kamera tentang sampah dan mendenda mereka, tetapi tidak menangkap orang yang benar-benar membobol atau mencuri perahu, sepeda, atau kayak...oke."

Banyak sekali tetangga yang kasar dan rasis, sampai-sampai kami tidak lagi pergi ke taman anjing—bahkan ada orang yang berbalik dan pergi ke arah lain ketika melihat saya berjalan...

Setelah bertahun-tahun tinggal di sini, ada begitu banyak hal yang dijanjikan kepada saya oleh manajer sebelumnya yang tidak pernah dilakukan, tetapi mereka akan terus menghubungi saya hanya karena $10.

Ini bukan properti yang benar-benar ramah, saya hanya dianggap sebagai angka—tidak pernah terlambat membayar selama bertahun-tahun dan malah diberitahu bahwa membayar lebih awal adalah masalah. Semuanya selalu menjadi masalah sampai-sampai saya mencoba melakukan perawatan sendiri agar tidak perlu berurusan dengan staf. Saya menyukai kru lama yang bekerja di sana, mereka menyelesaikan pekerjaan tanpa sikap yang buruk atau membuat Anda merasa mengganggu mereka.

Saya juga tidak mendapat pemberitahuan ketika ada lubang di dinding bangunan, dan tidak ada pembersihan karena masih ada pecahan kaca di mana-mana di trotoar dan anjing saya menginjak salah satunya.

Meminta pemeriksaan hewan peliharaan BERBAYAR padahal Anda sudah harus membayar RATUSAN untuk hewan peliharaan Anda pindah, sekali lagi, ini hanya upaya untuk mengeruk uang. Tapi saya memiliki lubang di dinding yang ditutupi dengan selotip dan dicat, sebelum saya pindah. Bahkan dengan pengendalian hama, semut di sini sangat banyak dan Anda masih harus mengeluarkan uang SENDIRI untuk solusi yang aman bagi hewan peliharaan.

Penyegelan di apartemen saya sangat buruk, lubang-lubang kecil dan celah di ruang cuci dan kamar mandi; di sekitar bak mandi dan pancuran sehingga Anda mungkin melihat beberapa serangga, bahkan di kamar mandi yang tidak pernah digunakan, saya pernah melihat laba-laba di meja di akhir minggu ketika saya melakukan pembilasan mingguan dan melewatinya.

Goresan-goresan yang terukir di lantai saya membuat hampir mustahil untuk membersihkan lantai karena ulah siapa pun yang tinggal di sini sebelumnya. Padahal saya diberitahu bahwa tidak ada yang tinggal di sini dalam waktu lama sebelum saya, jelas itu BOHONG.

Saya bahkan tidak mendapatkan pegangan di lemari saya, haha, dan renovasinya tidak sesuai janji saat diperlihatkan apartemen lain. Lampu-lampu di sini semuanya dipenuhi serangga sejak saya pertama kali pindah.... Anda tidak bisa meminta apa pun, yah, saya tidak bisa, atau saya diperlakukan seperti masalah, jadi saya sudah menerimanya, tetapi tempat ini telah mendorong saya hingga batas dan saya SUDAH CUKUP.

Setiap tetangga saya telah pindah setelah beberapa bulan, bahkan belum setahun penuh. Ini sangat mengecewakan karena beberapa orang yang ramah dan bersahabat, pergi karena cara properti ini memperlakukan orang. $1700 sebulan untuk "promo pemilik rumah."

Tetangga meninggalkan sampah mereka di luar selama berhari-hari sehingga menyebabkan serangga tanpa konsekuensi, tetapi saya meninggalkan tempat sampah saya di luar secara tidak sengaja selama beberapa jam ekstra dan didenda. Saya sudah lama tidak merasa disambut di sini dan tidak bisa berbicara dengan manajer karena saya menelepon tetapi tidak mendapat balasan setelah berbulan-bulan!

Taman anjing, selain orang-orang yang membuat suasana tidak nyaman, ada begitu banyak kotoran di sana, sungguh gila. Mereka menghilangkan tempat mandi hewan peliharaan (padahal itu tercantum sebagai fasilitas yang akan ada di taman anjing, jadi itu salah satu alasan saya memilih tempat ini) tanpa peringatan dan tidak pernah dipasang kembali, jadi setelah anjing Anda penuh dengan kotoran dan air kencing dari taman anjing, Anda harus memandikannya di rumah.

address: 1514 Ennis Joslin Rd, Corpus Christi, TX 78412
name: Qadira Carter
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Qadira - thanks for sharing your thoughts. First, we want to say that we're very sorry to hear how frustrating your time with us was. While we're glad you enjoyed the view and layout, we understand the overall experience didn’t meet your expectations. We'd appreciate the chance to speak with you directly and learn more. Please feel free to call us at (361) 991-2149. We hope to hear from you soon!
text: First of all, I’d like to address that this place falsely advertised so good, and I mean they really got us, so hats off to them for that. When we got our apartment, we realized that we were not getting the same one that was showed to us that we loved on the tour — some things that they had in the tour layout were not in the same layout when we got our unit, which we were told was renovated, and that was a complete lie. Within the first year, we had almost everything break on us including: a/c unit, both toilets, multiple cabinets and drawers, kitchen sink, etc. Also, every sink and tub was clogged and had horrible drainage. Painted over mold on the vents and tubs, silverfish in the bathrooms because of poor ventilation… I will say we enjoyed the spacious layout and kitchen and beautiful water view, but it’s not modernized and maintenance lacks. Another thing you’re going to hate while living here is the reserved parking. You may think at first, “Wow! Reserved parking sounds fancy and I’ll always have a place to park!” …well you’re wrong. Not everyone follows the rules and there are maintenance people, guests, service workers and other residents who are either not familiar with the guest parking or don’t care to follow it. If you park in someone else’s spot, you’ll likely get towed, and if you try to report someone else for parking in your reserved parking, they might tell them to move. So if you have a 2b2ba, you’d think they’d give you two reserved spaces, but you only get one, so the other person has to park over yonder if there’s available guest parking. Trash valet really sucks, they don’t come on time, and sometimes they don’t show up at all. Is that worth $1700+ a month? I’ll let you decide, but we no longer live here <3
textTranslated: Pertama-tama, saya ingin menyampaikan bahwa tempat ini mengiklankan diri dengan sangat baik, dan maksud saya mereka benar-benar berhasil menipu kami, jadi salut untuk mereka. Ketika kami mendapatkan apartemen kami, kami menyadari bahwa kami tidak mendapatkan apartemen yang sama seperti yang ditunjukkan kepada kami dan yang kami sukai saat tur — beberapa hal yang ada dalam tata letak tur tidak sama dengan tata letak unit kami, yang menurut mereka sudah direnovasi, dan itu adalah kebohongan besar. Dalam tahun pertama, hampir semua barang kami rusak, termasuk: unit AC, kedua toilet, beberapa lemari dan laci, wastafel dapur, dll. Selain itu, setiap wastafel dan bak mandi tersumbat dan memiliki saluran pembuangan yang buruk. Jamur yang ditutupi cat pada ventilasi dan bak mandi, kutu buku di kamar mandi karena ventilasi yang buruk… Saya akui kami menikmati tata letak yang luas dan dapur serta pemandangan air yang indah, tetapi tempat ini tidak modern dan perawatannya kurang. Hal lain yang akan Anda benci saat tinggal di sini adalah tempat parkir khusus. Anda mungkin berpikir pada awalnya, "Wow! Parkir khusus terdengar mewah dan saya akan selalu punya tempat parkir!" …yah, kamu salah. Tidak semua orang mengikuti aturan dan ada petugas perawatan, tamu, pekerja layanan, dan penghuni lain yang mungkin tidak familiar dengan parkir tamu atau tidak peduli untuk mengikutinya. Jika kamu parkir di tempat orang lain, kemungkinan besar mobilmu akan diderek, dan jika kamu mencoba melaporkan orang lain karena parkir di tempat parkir yang sudah kamu pesan, mereka mungkin akan menyuruhnya pindah. Jadi, jika kamu punya apartemen 2 kamar tidur dan 2 kamar mandi, kamu mungkin berpikir mereka akan memberimu dua tempat parkir yang sudah dipesan, tetapi kamu hanya mendapatkan satu, jadi orang lain harus parkir di tempat lain jika ada tempat parkir tamu yang tersedia. Layanan valet sampah benar-benar buruk, mereka tidak datang tepat waktu, dan terkadang mereka tidak datang sama sekali. Apakah itu sepadan dengan biaya $1700+ per bulan? Terserah kamu yang memutuskan, tapi kami sudah tidak tinggal di sini lagi <3

text:
I’d give a negative star if I could.
While I liked the apartment I lived in, the management here is HORRIBLE!
Towards the end of my lease there was a huge leak due to an issue with the hot water heaters in the community. Since they had to  shut the water off for 2 days and tear a wall down in my apartment to access plumbing, and install a giant dehumidifier for 3 days straight (which caused my electric bill to shoot through the roof), I was asked to get a hotel and was told I’d be reimbursed for all the expenses by Jomel who works in the management office. I cooperated with management even though this happened while I was in the middle of packing and moving because this was an unfortunate, unforeseen circumstance. But even though it’s been 1.5 months to this, I’ve not been reimbursed any amount.

And I was charged a big fat move out fee on top of my deposit although the apartment was returned in good shape. Which was settled but still no reimbursement. I was also charged $4000+ for a plumbing leak that happened and stopped in front of my eyes within minutes.

Elena, the leasing and business manager at this location assured me over a call and in writing that they’d treat this incident and charges separately from the other ones, but now went back on her word and still hasn’t settled the reimbursement.

I’ve lived in many communities but this experience has been awful. If you care about -
1. Your security deposit
2. Don’t want to pay thousands in move out, and 3. Care about good management/customer service

Do not make the mistake of living here. The management will do everything they can to make you rent there and charge you crazy amounts at move out with horrible service and false promises.
textTranslated:
Saya akan memberi bintang negatif kalau bisa.
Meskipun saya suka apartemen tempat saya tinggal, manajemen di sini BURUK SEKALI!
Menjelang akhir masa sewa saya, terjadi kebocoran besar karena masalah pada pemanas air di lingkungan sekitar. Karena mereka harus mematikan air selama 2 hari dan merobohkan dinding apartemen saya untuk mengakses pipa ledeng, serta memasang dehumidifier raksasa selama 3 hari berturut-turut (yang menyebabkan tagihan listrik saya melonjak tinggi), saya diminta untuk menginap di hotel dan diberi tahu bahwa saya akan mendapatkan penggantian semua biaya oleh Jomel yang bekerja di kantor manajemen. Saya bekerja sama dengan manajemen meskipun ini terjadi saat saya sedang berkemas dan pindah karena ini adalah keadaan yang tidak terduga dan tidak menguntungkan. Namun, meskipun sudah 1,5 bulan berlalu, saya belum mendapatkan penggantian uang.

Dan saya dikenakan biaya pindah yang sangat besar di atas uang jaminan saya meskipun apartemen dikembalikan dalam kondisi baik. Meskipun sudah diselesaikan, tetapi masih belum ada penggantian. Saya juga dikenakan biaya $4000+ untuk kebocoran pipa yang terjadi dan berhenti di depan mata saya dalam hitungan menit.

Elena, manajer penyewaan dan bisnis di lokasi ini, meyakinkan saya melalui telepon dan tertulis bahwa mereka akan menangani insiden dan tagihan ini secara terpisah dari yang lain, tetapi sekarang mengingkari janjinya dan masih belum melunasi penggantian biaya.

Saya telah tinggal di banyak komunitas, tetapi pengalaman ini sangat buruk. Jika Anda peduli dengan -
1. Uang jaminan Anda
2. Tidak ingin membayar ribuan dolar untuk pindah, dan 3. Peduli dengan manajemen/layanan pelanggan yang baik

Jangan membuat kesalahan dengan tinggal di sini. Manajemen akan melakukan segala yang mereka bisa untuk membuat Anda menyewa di sana dan menagih Anda dengan jumlah yang sangat besar saat pindah dengan layanan yang buruk dan janji-janji palsu.

name: Ashley O.
responseFromOwnerText: Ashley, we're always glad to receive our former residents' feedback as it allows us to fine-tune our efforts at delivering an amazing living experience. Thank you for highlighting our convenient location and friendly service. We regret your concerns with noise, package handling, and our move-out policies. text:
This review is primarily for the move out process. Like all the other reviews, don't expect to get your deposit back, and expect to pay a couple hundred dollars more. They charged us $500 for move out utilities (They said utilities is billed 3 months behind. My sister and I were residents for 2 years and our utilities never exceeded $100/month so I'm sure sure what the extra $200 is for). They also charged us $531 for basic cleaning, carpet cleaning, and paint. We also got charged $50 for replacement cutting boards that we didn't even know we had, and definitely did not use.

In terms of our experience living here (3/5), maintenance was always friendly and wonderful. The location worked great for my sister and I. The office staff was always responsive and friendly. However, if your apartment faces the courtyards, expect loud parties, loud music, bad karaoke, and dogs barking until all hours of the morning (especially in the summer/warmer weather). Even with all our windows closed, it was still extremely loud and disruptive. We tried calling security multiple times, but they either didn't pick up or never addressed the noise. They have a locker system for packages, but half the time my packages would be thrown on the floor along with a ton other packages you have to sort through. There are also theft issues with the package room as well. I've been contacted by Milpitas PD multiple times due to them finding my packages in random people's cars that they've pulled over.

We decided not to renew our lease this year due to the cons outweighing the pros. We have since moved to a different complex in Milpitas for the same price and we are not having any noise or package issues.
textTranslated:
Ulasan ini terutama ditujukan untuk proses pindahan. Seperti semua ulasan lainnya, jangan berharap mendapatkan kembali uang deposit Anda, dan bersiaplah untuk membayar beberapa ratus dolar lebih. Mereka menagih kami $500 untuk utilitas pindahan (Mereka bilang utilitas ditagih terlambat 3 bulan. Saya dan saudara perempuan saya tinggal di sini selama 2 tahun dan utilitas kami tidak pernah melebihi $100/bulan, jadi saya yakin untuk apa tambahan $200 itu). Mereka juga menagih kami $531 untuk pembersihan dasar, pembersihan karpet, dan pengecatan. Kami juga ditagih $50 untuk talenan pengganti yang bahkan tidak kami ketahui keberadaannya, dan jelas tidak kami gunakan.

Sejauh pengalaman kami tinggal di sini (3/5), petugas kebersihannya selalu ramah dan luar biasa. Lokasinya sangat cocok untuk saya dan saudara perempuan saya. Staf kantor selalu responsif dan ramah. Namun, jika apartemen Anda menghadap halaman, bersiaplah untuk pesta yang ramai, musik yang keras, karaoke yang buruk, dan anjing menggonggong hingga larut malam (terutama di musim panas/cuaca yang lebih hangat). Bahkan dengan semua jendela kami tertutup, suasananya tetap sangat bising dan mengganggu. Kami mencoba menghubungi petugas keamanan beberapa kali, tetapi mereka tidak mengangkat atau tidak pernah mengatasi kebisingan tersebut. Mereka memiliki sistem loker untuk paket, tetapi separuh waktu paket saya akan dilempar ke lantai bersama banyak paket lain yang harus disortir. Ada juga masalah pencurian di ruang paket. Saya telah dihubungi oleh Kepolisian Milpitas beberapa kali karena mereka menemukan paket saya di mobil orang-orang yang mereka tilang.

Kami memutuskan untuk tidak memperpanjang sewa tahun ini karena kerugiannya lebih besar daripada keuntungannya. Sejak itu, kami telah pindah ke kompleks lain di Milpitas dengan harga yang sama dan kami tidak mengalami masalah kebisingan atau paket.

responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear your visit didn’t meet expectations and appreciate the chance to clarify.

Edge House has been designed with a range of layouts and views, and our team is always available to walk buyers through every detail, including site context. We encourage prospective buyers to visit our sales gallery for the most accurate and complete understanding of the project.

text: Buyers beware of the extremely deceptive advertising of this property. We went to see it in person (in late July 2025) and were shocked at the awful plot of land this will sit on (see attached pictures). The marketing conveniently does not mention that only the very top few floors will have direct Biscayne Bay views. The rest of the building will be directly wedged up against existing 50+ story condo buildings, with only a sliver (maybe 10 feet?) of an alley in between, providing direct views of concrete and neighbor building's units while blocking out all sunlight. As another commenter mentioned, if their advertising is this dishonest, we can only imagine the quality of the finished building (if it even happens, as apparently this company has a very poor track record).
textTranslated: Pembeli harap berhati-hati dengan iklan properti ini yang sangat menyesatkan. Kami pergi melihatnya secara langsung (pada akhir Juli 2025) dan terkejut dengan kondisi lahan yang buruk tempat bangunan ini akan berdiri (lihat gambar terlampir). Pemasarannya dengan sengaja tidak menyebutkan bahwa hanya beberapa lantai teratas yang akan memiliki pemandangan langsung ke Teluk Biscayne. Bagian bangunan lainnya akan langsung berbatasan dengan bangunan kondominium yang sudah ada setinggi 50+ lantai, dengan hanya sedikit lorong (mungkin 10 kaki?) di antaranya, yang memberikan pemandangan langsung ke beton dan unit bangunan tetangga sambil menghalangi semua sinar matahari. Seperti yang disebutkan oleh komentator lain, jika iklan mereka sangat tidak jujur, kita hanya bisa membayangkan kualitas bangunan yang sudah jadi (jika memang terwujud, karena tampaknya perusahaan ini memiliki rekam jejak yang sangat buruk).

address: 1789 Biscayne Blvd, Miami, FL 33132
name: Vinay Mahadik
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for sharing such a thoughtful and detailed review. We’re delighted to hear that your experience with Edge House, from the location and design to the sales gallery and team, has exceeded your expectations. It’s wonderful to know the neighborhood, views, and lifestyle resonate so strongly with you and your family. We look forward to welcoming you to your new home soon!
text:
We spent months researching Miami, and bought our dream vacation home & investment property here.

What we like about Edge House:
1. We came in fixated on Brickell but although we love Brickell, we felt a bit "suffocated" by the chaos/buzz, and felt like we would like to visit it but not stay in it. We wanted something more chic, more relaxed - and when we drove by the Edge House area, especially the N Bayshort Dr road by Margaret Pace Park - both my wife and I felt a sense of calm and tranquility kick in. We both independently felt the area had a positive energy about it.
2. We visited Edge House office the next day - and the entire experience was very slick - the beautiful sales office, the choice of colors of the paint, the logo, the sales team, the sales assets, the snacks they served, the presentation - etc. Everything was just well done. This is after visiting many sales presentations and many condo properties (Paraiso, Icon Brickell, Brickell Heights etc)
3. I saw some comments about "worst piece of land" - and I encourage them/you to see Google Maps view to see the piece of land in context to Aria by the Bay and the other condos next to it. The land is comparable in size to these.
4. Regarding the views, the North, East and South side of the building gets to see the Bay - and that was awesome for us. We got a South+East facing unit and are very, very happy with the views. Note that you get unobstructed views of the bay from 100s of units in the building - and this is RARE in Brickell.
5. We had dinner at CassaDona - and omg, we could not believe such a high pair of restaurants are literally steps away from the condo. The park + bay + restaurants create an unbeatable vibe for us
6. We are already picturing buying or renting a boat when we stay there and visit the Pace Picnic Island you can see closely or even boat farther into the Bay.
7. Edge House is among the handful of buildings in Miami that allow Airbnb. Just few days ago the city started cracking down on illegal airbnbs in Brickell and it was a big relief to know that this would not be a problem for Edge House.

Overall, we are in love with Edge House and this spot. We can't wait to move in!
textTranslated:
Kami menghabiskan berbulan-bulan meneliti Miami, dan membeli rumah liburan impian kami sekaligus properti investasi di sini.

Apa yang kami sukai tentang Edge House:
1. Awalnya kami terpaku pada Brickell, tetapi meskipun kami menyukai Brickell, kami merasa sedikit "sesak" oleh kekacauan/hiruk-pikuknya, dan merasa ingin mengunjunginya tetapi tidak ingin tinggal di sana. Kami menginginkan sesuatu yang lebih elegan, lebih santai - dan ketika kami melewati area Edge House, terutama jalan N Bayshort Dr di dekat Taman Margaret Pace - baik saya maupun istri saya merasakan ketenangan dan kedamaian. Kami berdua secara independen merasakan area tersebut memiliki energi positif.
2. Kami mengunjungi kantor Edge House keesokan harinya - dan seluruh pengalaman sangat menyenangkan - kantor penjualan yang indah, pilihan warna cat, logo, tim penjualan, aset penjualan, makanan ringan yang mereka sajikan, presentasi - dll. Semuanya dilakukan dengan sangat baik. Ini setelah mengunjungi banyak presentasi penjualan dan banyak properti kondominium (Paraiso, Icon Brickell, Brickell Heights, dll.)
3. Saya melihat beberapa komentar tentang "sebidang tanah terburuk" - dan saya mendorong mereka/Anda untuk melihat tampilan Google Maps untuk melihat sebidang tanah tersebut dalam konteks Aria by the Bay dan kondominium lain di sebelahnya. Ukuran tanahnya sebanding dengan properti-properti tersebut.
4. Mengenai pemandangan, sisi Utara, Timur, dan Selatan gedung menghadap Teluk - dan itu luar biasa bagi kami. Kami mendapatkan unit yang menghadap Selatan+Timur dan sangat, sangat senang dengan pemandangannya. Perlu dicatat bahwa Anda mendapatkan pemandangan Teluk yang tidak terhalang dari ratusan unit di gedung ini - dan ini LANGKA di Brickell.
5. Kami makan malam di CassaDona - dan ya ampun, kami tidak percaya dua restoran kelas atas seperti itu hanya beberapa langkah dari kondominium. Taman + teluk + restoran menciptakan suasana yang tak tertandingi bagi kami.

7. Edge House termasuk di antara segelintir bangunan di Miami yang mengizinkan Airbnb. Beberapa hari yang lalu kota mulai menindak Airbnb ilegal di Brickell dan merupakan suatu kelegaan besar mengetahui bahwa ini tidak akan menjadi masalah bagi Edge House.

address: 1514 Ennis Joslin Rd, Corpus Christi, TX 78412
name: Mr. Davis
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Mr. Davis - thank you for this review and for spotlighting what has fallen short throughout your experience here. We are so sorry that our team has inspired these feelings. Ensuring you feel welcome and appreciated as a resident is very important to us. Please give us another ring at (361) 991-2149 so we can work towards making things right!
text:
I changed the rating to 3 stars because Beth did eventually call me back and we discussed the issues. She confirmed that we are wanted and welcome. She said she would speak with the staff and train them to deal with renters in a professional, courteous welcoming manner.
I hope to see the improvements and will report my findings in a future review.

We have lived here for almost two years now and have had many negative experiences with management and noisy tenants. I left several messages for the manger, Beth to return my call to report, yet again another negative encounter with the front office staff. I never received a call back after multiple attempts.
We just don't feel wanted here. It doesn't feel like home. For example, my wife and I walked our small dog Marley to get the mail. We stopped by the club house to get some water and we're stopped by 2 office people. Right when we walked through the front doors an office worker stopped and actually blocked us from coming in. She began questioning why we were there and we explained we just picked up our mail and wanted to get some water because it was hot outside. She moved  out of the way and said we could proceed but gave us no hello or warm welcome.  We were leaving the club house and stopped again by another office worker and she proceeded to kick us out stating there were no dogs allowed. She was very aggressive, rude and dismissive. My wife and I felt unwanted and wondered why we were targeted in such an unfriendly and aggressive manner. We were quiet, our dog Marley did not bark and we were already on our way out. We pay our rent on time and follow the rules too.
Another incident occured when my family stayed for a visit and my nephew and Mother in Law came with me to the pool. The front office kicked them out. They explained they were here with me. They had my pool key and I was in the gym right next to the pool. The front office employees dismissed them and  said they were not welcome at the pool and need to leave right away. They never tried to contact me or  let my Mother in Law go to the clubhouse  to get me. Again we all felt unwanted and unwelcome.
Similar examples have occured, but I think this review gives an accurate account of how renters are treated at La Joya Bay Resort.
textTranslated:
Saya mengubah peringkat menjadi 3 bintang karena Beth akhirnya menelepon saya kembali dan kami membahas masalahnya. Dia menegaskan bahwa kami diinginkan dan diterima. Dia mengatakan akan berbicara dengan staf dan melatih mereka untuk menangani penyewa dengan cara yang profesional, sopan, dan ramah.
Saya berharap melihat perbaikan dan akan melaporkan temuan saya dalam ulasan mendatang.

Kami telah tinggal di sini selama hampir dua tahun dan telah mengalami banyak pengalaman negatif dengan manajemen dan penyewa yang berisik. Saya meninggalkan beberapa pesan untuk manajer, Beth, untuk menelepon balik saya untuk melaporkan, sekali lagi, pengalaman negatif lainnya dengan staf kantor depan. Saya tidak pernah menerima panggilan balik setelah beberapa kali mencoba.
Kami hanya merasa tidak diinginkan di sini. Rasanya tidak seperti rumah. Misalnya, saya dan istri saya mengajak anjing kecil kami, Marley, berjalan-jalan untuk mengambil surat. Kami mampir ke clubhouse untuk mengambil air dan dihentikan oleh 2 orang dari kantor. Tepat ketika kami berjalan melalui pintu depan, seorang pekerja kantor berhenti dan bahkan menghalangi kami untuk masuk. Dia mulai mempertanyakan mengapa kami ada di sana dan kami menjelaskan bahwa kami baru saja mengambil surat dan ingin mengambil air karena cuaca panas di luar. Dia menyingkir dan mengatakan kami bisa melanjutkan, tetapi tidak menyapa atau memberikan sambutan hangat. Kami sedang meninggalkan gedung klub dan dihentikan lagi oleh seorang pekerja kantor lain, dan dia langsung mengusir kami dengan alasan tidak diperbolehkan membawa anjing. Dia sangat agresif, kasar, dan meremehkan. Saya dan istri saya merasa tidak diinginkan dan bertanya-tanya mengapa kami menjadi sasaran dengan cara yang tidak ramah dan agresif seperti itu. Kami diam, anjing kami Marley tidak menggonggong, dan kami sudah dalam perjalanan keluar. Kami membayar sewa tepat waktu dan juga mengikuti aturan.
Insiden lain terjadi ketika keluarga saya berkunjung dan keponakan serta ibu mertua saya ikut bersama saya ke kolam renang. Kantor depan mengusir mereka. Mereka menjelaskan bahwa mereka ada di sini bersama saya. Mereka memegang kunci kolam renang saya dan saya berada di pusat kebugaran tepat di sebelah kolam renang. Karyawan kantor depan mengabaikan mereka dan mengatakan mereka tidak diterima di kolam renang dan harus segera pergi. Mereka tidak pernah mencoba menghubungi saya atau membiarkan ibu mertua saya pergi ke gedung klub untuk menjemput saya. Sekali lagi, kami semua merasa tidak diinginkan dan tidak diterima.

Contoh serupa memang pernah terjadi, tetapi saya rasa ulasan ini memberikan gambaran akurat tentang bagaimana penyewa diperlakukan di La Joya Bay Resort.

text:
Lived here for almost a year and it’s been a great experience overall. The interiors are nice and the gym is one of the better ones I’ve seen in an apartment building. Maintenance and management have also been consistently responsive and easy to work with.

The only downside is noise from Duke’s Hideaway on Friday and Saturday nights during the spring, summer, and fall. My unit is close enough to hear it, but far enough that it’s not very annoying, and it always shuts off around midnight. If you’re in a unit directly bordering Duke’s, just be aware it can get very loud.

Overall, I’d recommend living here if the location of your unit is good.
